narrative_beat: Wide aerial of contemporary city P&B with red blinking dots on corners, giant crimson-gold angel silhouette floating above with open parchment

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an aerial night view of a contemporary metropolis with hundreds of tiny blinking red surveillance camera dots on every corner
subject.focal_point: a colossal angelic silhouette in crimson and gold robes floating above, holding an open parchment
subject.secondary: Desaturated night cityscape below. Angel in rich colors above. Floating embers.

environment.location: a surveilled modern city at night

composition.rule: rule of thirds with angel at upper third
composition.foreground: angel and parchment in rich crimson and gold
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white city with red dot accents

lighting.key_light: divine vertical light from angel downward

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.secondary: angel as bridge between Daniel and today

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
